revision.comment: 新規カテゴリ
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|農業政策}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|各国の農業|日本の農業}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政|日本の行政}}
[[日本]]の[[農業政策]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:農業政策|にほん]] [[Category:日本の農業|せいさく]] [[Category:日本の行政|のうきよう]]

revision.comment: [[Category:日本の行政]]を除去; [[Category:日本の公共政策]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|農業政策}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|各国の農業|日本の農業}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政|日本の行政}}
[[日本]]の[[農業政策]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:農業政策|にほん]] [[Category:日本の農業|せいさく]] [[Category:日本の公共政策|のうきよう]]

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]

Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|農業政策}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|各国の農業|日本の農業}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政|日本の行政}} }} [[日本]]の[[農業政策]]に関するカテゴリ。
==Old Content==
.
==Categories==
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本の農業政策|comment=category history here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の農業政策|version=85415489}} [[Category:Agricultural policy]] [[Category:Agriculture in Japan]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Public policy in Japan]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Agricultural policy]] [[Category:Agriculture in Japan]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Public policy in Japan]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:日本の農業政策]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の農業関連法規]]

==Japanese Content== {{Pathnavbox| * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|農業政策}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|経済|産業|農林水産業|農業|各国の農業|日本の農業}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政|日本の行政}} }} [[Japan]]の[[農業政策]]に関するカテゴリ。

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:

{{Pathnavbox|
